# Varghese Summersett / VersusTexas.com

> Premier Texas law firm with offices in Fort Worth, Dallas, Southlake, and Houston.
> Practice areas: Criminal Defense, Federal Criminal Defense, Personal Injury, Family Law, Juvenile Defense.
